Description.Name: Wraith Shield
Description.Details:
Developed under RISC's classified Phantom Initiative, the Wraith Suppression Shield System, or W3S, advances Star League mimetic principles through an active phased-array optical disruption field. Adaptive polarization cells across the mech's surface continuously sample and reproject surrounding terrain, blurring visual resolution at a considerably higher level than previous iterations such as CLPS.

By the time anyone noticed that even the abbreviated name was a bit of a mouthful, it was too late to redesignate the project. Most Mechwarriors just call it 'God Mode.'
